# Jonathan Malkin

> AI automation consultant and builder. I help teams map messy business workflows, design safe AI pilots, and build practical automation systems.

## About

Jonathan Malkin is an AI automation consultant and product builder based in Austin, Texas. After 20+ years in enterprise technology (presales, solutions engineering, business analysis), he now helps teams turn operational friction into AI-assisted systems, safe pilot maps, and implementation plans.

His primary work product is Jules, a deeply customized Claude Code system with skills, rules, hooks, memory, and automated workflows that runs his own business. He writes about AI infrastructure, implementation strategy, automation workflows, and the practical reality of building with AI.

## Key Topics

- Claude Code: skills, hooks, rules, CLAUDE.md configuration, subagent orchestration
- AI agents: autonomous workflows, model selection, team-based agent architectures
- AI operations: workflow design, automation patterns, and operational systems
- Advisory and workshops: AI Workflow Friction Map sessions, implementation planning, and practical delivery
